description_long: This armchair features a high, slightly winged backrest and gently sloped armrests, all upholstered in a smooth, taupe-colored faux leather or leather material. The seat is broad and well-cushioned, providing ample comfort, while the backrest curves subtly to offer ergonomic support. The armrests are integrated into the chair's frame, following the same upholstery and padding as the rest of the chair. The legs are straight, slightly tapered, and made of dark-stained wood, giving the chair a sturdy and elegant appearance. The upholstery is seamless and unadorned, with no visible patterns or tufting, contributing to a modern, minimalist aesthetic. This armchair would be suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments, such as lobbies, patios, or sidewalk seating areas.
description: A modern, taupe-colored armchair with a high, winged backrest, smooth upholstery, and dark wooden legs. The design is minimalist and comfortable, with integrated armrests and a broad cushioned seat.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high backrest, broad seat, and gently sloped armrests with smooth taupe upholstery.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the curved backrest and the seamless transition of upholstery over the back and sides.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the tall, continuous backrest and the dark wooden legs supporting the chair.
description_view_3: Side-front view emphasizing the depth of the seat, the slope of the armrests, and the overall modern silhouette.
attribute_backrest_style: high and slightly winged, continuous upholstery
